name: Night of Spirits
short_description: Night of Spirits is an individual or online horror game for up to 4 players, where the main objective is to hunt down the spirits that haunt the city.
detailed_description:
Night of Spirits is a solo or online horror game for up to 4 players, where the main objective is to hunt down the ghosts that haunt the city. You will have to use your tools to hunt down the spirit, from buying the necessary components to building your own tools, you can also sell the relics you find from each ghost.

SPIRITS
· The mutant #1
· The mutant #2
· The Legless
· The BigMouth

MAPS
· Suburban
· Mansion
· School
· Farm House

CRAFT SYSTEM
The new crafting system allows you to create objects for the needs of each spirit, from candles with different aromas or incense.

CRAFT SYSTEM
The new crafting system allows you to create objects for the needs of each spirit, from candles with different aromas or incense.

NEW VOLUMETRIC SYSTEM
Our new volumetric system allows you to select an area of the map where the spirit will spawn, it depends on each spirit, the room environment will be different, from a cold room to orbs.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Russian
*languages with full audio support
